recommendations.title: The Strays
recommendations.overview: A Black woman's meticulously crafted life of privilege starts to unravel when two strangers show up in her quaint suburban town.

recommendations.title: The Nut Job 2: Nutty by Nature
recommendations.overview: When the evil mayor of Oakton decides to bulldoze Liberty Park and build a dangerous amusement park in its place, Surly Squirrel and his ragtag group of animal friends need to band together to save their home, defeat the mayor, and take back the park

recommendations.title: Black Dynamite
recommendations.overview: This is the story of 1970s African-American action legend Black Dynamite. The Man killed his brother, pumped heroin into local orphanages, and flooded the ghetto with adulterated malt liquor. Black Dynamite was the one hero willing to fight The Man a

recommendations.title: Tales of the Black Freighter
recommendations.overview: A mariner survives an attack from the dreaded pirates of the Black Freighter, but his struggle to return home to warn it has a horrific cost.

recommendations.title: Blancanieves
recommendations.overview: A black and white silent movie, based on the Snow White fairy tale, that is set in a romantic version of 1920s Seville and centered on a female bullfighter.

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Snow Blind
recommendations.overview: Hellbent on taking over Earthrealm, Kano viciously attacks town after town with the aid of three cold-blooded Black Dragon mercenaries. Those who don’t submit are annihilated but one young man won’t bend the knee to Kano: Kenshi.

recommendations.title: Return to Reason
recommendations.overview: Experimental film, white specks and shapes gyrating over a black background, the light-striped torso of Kiki of Montparnasse (Alice Prin), a gyrating eggcrate. One of the first Dadaist films.

recommendations.title: A Patch of Blue
recommendations.overview: A blind, uneducated white girl is befriended by a black man, who becomes determined to help her escape her impoverished and abusive home life.

recommendations.title: The Defiant Ones
recommendations.overview: Two convicts—one white, one black—escape while chained to each other.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
recommendations.overview: While Po and his father are visiting a secret panda village, an evil spirit threatens all of China, forcing Po to form a ragtag army to fight back.
